summary: A Go-based CLI tool for infrastructure validation, Goss migration, and MCP-integrated reporting.
concerns: Uncommitted changes (1 modified, 1 staged) may indicate incomplete work
Heavy reliance on internal packages could hinder external contribution
Migration logic tightly coupled to Goss format
suggestions: Commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean working tree
Document the MCP handler endpoints and expected payloads
Expand test coverage for the dashboard and baseline modules
